toast.spaceDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this space?

toast.aiAssistantDesc: Ask AI to analyse your documents

spaceDelete.title: Delete space
spaceDelete.confirmEmpty: Are you sure you want to delete space "{{name}}"? This action is irreversible.
spaceDelete.reassignOne: Space "{{name}}" contains {{count}} document. Choose a compatible destination space to reassign it before deletion.
spaceDelete.reassignMany: Space "{{name}}" contains {{count}} documents. Choose a compatible destination space to reassign them before deletion.
spaceDelete.restrictionHint: Only spaces whose targeting (funds, segments, user types) can host the current space's contents are listed.
spaceDelete.noCompatible: No destination space can host this space's contents without targeting conflict. Broaden another space's targeting or update this one before deletion.

massUpload.title: Multi-space mass import
massUpload.subtitle: Add documents from the spaces view
massUpload.originFolderBody: By default, your documents will land in the "{{name}}" folder, inside the "{{spaceName}}" space. You can override the folder individually on the next step.
massUpload.originSpaceBody: By default, your documents will land at the root of the "{{name}}" space. You can pick a sub-folder on the next step.
massUpload.originResetToast: Default folder cleared — documents will need to be filed manually

spacesView.noResultsFor: No document or folder found for "{{query}}".
spacesView.emptyHintFilter: Adjust your global search "{{query}}" or clear the field to see all spaces again.
spacesView.emptyHint: Create your first space to organise your documents and control access

tracking.heroSubtitle: Engagement tracking & smart follow-ups for your Data Room

tracking.useCasesSubtitle: Optimise every aspect of your fundraising process
tracking.ctaTitle: Ready to optimise your Data Room?
tracking.ctaSubtitle: Enable the Tracking module and start measuring investor engagement today
tracking.moduleActivatedDesc: The tracking dashboard will soon be available with every engagement metric for your Data Room.

features.realtimeDesc: Global activity, traffic peaks, hot/cold documents
features.engagementDesc: Per-organisation score based on views, read time, scroll depth, Q&A
features.heatmapsDesc: Topics consulted (ESG, governance, fees…), per LP and per role/segment
features.nudgesDesc: Ready-to-use alerts (e.g. "3 LPs haven't opened the Fees section")
features.campaignsDesc: Targets: Unvisited / Inactive X days / Pending Q&A / Incomplete story
features.exportsDesc: Signed logs (hash) and Excel/CSV export for audit/BI

useCases.perGuestDesc: 360° LP profile with activity timeline, silences & risks
useCases.perFileDesc: Top views, median read time, in-document heatmap
useCases.campaignsDesc: Automatic segments with 1-to-1 or bulk reminders
useCases.complianceDesc: Private analytics, dynamic watermarking, anomaly detection

listView.deleteFolderConfirmEmpty: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action is irreversible and also removes empty subfolders.

listView.deleteFolderNotEmptyMany: Folder "{{name}}" contains {{count}} items. Empty it (or move its content) before deleting it.
listView.deleteFolderReassignOne: "{{name}}" contains {{count}} document. Choose a compatible destination folder to reassign it before deletion.
listView.deleteFolderReassignMany: "{{name}}" contains {{count}} documents. Choose a compatible destination folder to reassign them before deletion.

listView.deleteFolderNoCompatible: No destination folder is compatible with the documents' restrictions (fund, share class, segment). Update the documents' targeting or create a compatible folder.
